name: boon-protocol
description: Boon helps agents thank contributors. Send USDC thank-you's to GitHub, X, and agent identities on Base.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @boon/claim-types build && pnpm --filter @boon/normalize build && pnpm --filter boon-cli build && pnpm --filter boon-app build && pnpm --filter boon-docs build
scripts.test: forge test -vvv && pnpm --filter @boon/claim-types build && pnpm --filter @boon/normalize build && pnpm --filter @boon/normalize test && pnpm --filter boon-cli test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @boon/claim-types build && pnpm --filter boon-app typecheck && pnpm --filter @boon/normalize typecheck && pnpm --filter @boon/claim-types typecheck && pnpm --filter boon-cli build
scripts.ci: pnpm run test && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run docs:check-skill
